extraction.one_line_summary: PEDERSEN Mads won stage 19 in a photo finish against ASGREEN Kasper after early break established at 12 seconds, holding through cat-3 climb 28km from finish.
tactical_patterns: PEDERSEN repeatedly attacked early to filter Breakaway strength before settling into nine-rider group that stuck.
UAE placed TRENTIN in break despite defending yellow, signaling confidence in Vingegaard's control but hedging GC options.
Break established at only 12 seconds initially, suggesting peloton willing to gamble on low gap holding on lumpy profile.

rider_signals.POLITT Nils: negative: snapped chain from power output in break, then received wrong pedal setup from team car, catastrophic mechanical management
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: won third Tour stage by controlling sprint from 500m out despite VAN DER POEL leadout for ASGREEN
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: neutral: led out ASGREEN in sprint despite green jersey implications, prioritizing teammate over personal points classification
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: stayed in peloton on lumpy stage 28km cat-3, confirms no GC attacks expected until final mountain stage
